figures_detected.description: Top-down view of transmission assembly showing bolt/component locations marked with X symbols
Cross-section diagram showing Gauge and Lp measurement location on primary pulley assembly

rows.condition: If Lp2 - Lp1 is less than 0.05
rows.action: use a new snap ring whose thickness is the same as that used on the old primary pulley side ("old shim").

rows.condition: If Lp2 - Lp1 is equal to or greater than 0.05, but less than 0.13
rows.action: use a new snap ring one rank higher in thickness than the old snap ring.

rows.condition: If Lp2 - Lp1 is equal to or greater than 0.13, but less than 0.21
rows.action: use a new snap ring two ranks higher in thickness than the old snap ring.

rows.condition: If Lp2 - Lp1 is equal to or greater than 0.21, but less than 0.29
rows.action: use a new snap ring three ranks higher in thickness than the old snap ring.

rows.condition: If Lp2 - Lp1 is equal to or greater than 0.29, but less than 0.37
rows.action: use a new snap ring four ranks higher in thickness than the old snap ring.

rows.condition: If Lp2 - Lp1 is equal to or greater than 0.37, but less than 0.45
rows.action: use a new snap ring five ranks higher in thickness than the old snap ring.

rows.condition: If Lp1 - Lp2 is equal to or greater than 0.01, but less than 0.09
rows.action: use a snap ring one rank lower in thickness than the old snap ring.

rows.condition: If Lp1 - Lp2 is equal to or greater than 0.09, but less than 0.17
rows.action: use a new snap ring two ranks lower in thickness than the old snap ring.

rows.condition: If Lp1 - Lp2 is equal to or greater than 0.17, but less than 0.25
rows.action: use a new snap ring three ranks lower in thickness than the old snap ring.

rows.condition: If Lp1 - Lp2 is equal to or greater than 0.25, but less than 0.33
rows.action: use a new snap ring four ranks lower in thickness than the old snap ring.

rows.condition: If Lp1 - Lp2 is equal to or greater than 0.33, but less than 0.41
rows.action: use a new snap ring five ranks lower in thickness than the old snap ring.
